header.title: Protection Order Application
header.subtitle: Louisiana Petition for Protection from Abuse

warnings.noSave: Your information is NOT saved. Complete this form in one session. Closing this page will lose all progress.

beforeYouBegin.title: Before You Begin
beforeYouBegin.intro: This form will help you petition the court for a protection order against someone who has harmed or threatened you.

items.personDetails: Details about the person you need protection from
items.childrenInfo: Information about any children who need protection
items.address: Your current address (or you can keep it private)

submit.incompleteError: Please complete all required fields before submitting.

progress.title: Form Progress
progress.description: More sections will be added as we continue development. Currently showing 5 of 15 sections.

finalConfirmation.label: I swear that everything in this petition is true to the best of my knowledge. I understand that lying on this form is perjury, a crime punishable by law.
finalConfirmation.clearConfirmation: Are you sure? This will clear all information you've entered.

footer.text: Louisiana Bar Association • Domestic Violence Protection Order Intake

filing_type.label: Is this your first time filing for protection or are you updating a previous request?
filing_type.helpText: Choose 'First time' if this is new, 'Update' if modifying existing petition

filing_for.label: Are you filling this out for yourself or someone else?
filing_for.helpText: Choose 'For myself' if you need protection, 'For someone else' if helping another person

who_needs_protection.label: Who needs protection? (Check all that apply)
who_needs_protection.helpText: Select everyone who needs to be protected from harm
who_needs_protection.validationError: Please select at least one option

full_name.label: What is your full legal name?
full_name.helpText: Enter your name exactly as it appears on official documents

birth_date.label: What is your date of birth?

louisiana_resident.label: I am a resident of Louisiana
louisiana_resident.helpText: You must be a Louisiana resident to use this form

name.label: What is the full name of the person you need protection from?
name.placeholder: Enter their legal name if you know it

is_minor.label: This person is under 18 years old
is_minor.helpText: Check this only if the person you need protection from is a minor

parent_guardian.label: What is the name of their parent or guardian?

know_address.label: Do you know where this person lives or works?
know_address.helpText: We need an address to serve them with court papers. If you don't know, the court may help locate them.

options.yes: Yes, I know where they can be found
options.no: No, I don't know their address

defendant.address_info: Provide an address where they can be found. This can be their home or work address.

parish.label: Which Louisiana parish does this person live in?

have_children.label: Are there any children who need protection?
have_children.helpText: Include all minor children (under 18) who need to be protected

list.label: Children Needing Protection
list.description: Add details for each child below:

same_address.label: The children live with me at my address
same_address.helpText: Select yes if children share your address

safety.privacy_warning: If you don't want the abuser to know your address, check the box below. Your address will be kept confidential in court records.

keep_private.label: Keep my address secret from the person I'm afraid of
keep_private.helpText: Select this if sharing your address could put you in danger

safety.address_note: This address will appear in court documents.

accommodations.rights_notice: Your Rights: The court must provide reasonable accommodations to ensure you can participate fully in your hearing.

need_interpreter.label: Do you need an interpreter for your court hearing?
need_interpreter.helpText: Available at no cost to you

options.no: No, I don't need an interpreter

interpreter_language.label: What language do you need?
interpreter_language.placeholder: e.g., Spanish, Vietnamese, American Sign Language
interpreter_language.helpText: The court will arrange for a qualified interpreter

witness_interpreter.label: Will any witnesses need an interpreter?
witness_interpreter.helpText: Tell us if any witnesses will need language assistance

options.no: No, witnesses don't need an interpreter

disability_accommodations.label: Do you need other accommodations due to a disability?

accommodations.clerk_notice: Note: The court clerk will contact you about accommodation arrangements after you file your petition.

venue.where_to_file_notice: Where to File: You must file in a parish where either you live, the abuser lives, or where the abuse happened. Choose the most convenient location.

filing_parish.label: Which parish will you file this petition in?
filing_parish.helpText: Select the Louisiana parish courthouse where you'll file

venue_reasons.label: Why are you filing in this parish? (Check all that apply)
venue_reasons.validation_error: Please select at least one reason

venue.jurisdiction_notice: Important: The court must have jurisdiction over your case. If you're unsure which parish to choose, consider filing where you currently live for safety and convenience.

relationship.why_matters_notice: Why this matters: Louisiana law provides protection orders for specific relationships. Your relationship to the abuser determines which legal protections are available.

relationship_type.label: What is your relationship to the person you're afraid of?
relationship_type.helpText: Select the option that best describes your relationship

have_child_together.label: Do you have a child together?
have_child_together.helpText: Even if you're not in a relationship now

relationship.current_or_former_notice: Current or Former: Protection orders cover both current relationships and former relationships. You don't have to be together now to qualify.

legalStatus.existing_cases_notice: Existing Cases: Tell us about any divorce or custody cases involving you and the person you're afraid of. This helps the court coordinate your protection order with other legal proceedings.

pending_divorce.label: Is there a pending divorce case between you and this person?
pending_divorce.helpText: Check this only if there is currently a divorce case pending

divorce_parish.label: Which parish is the divorce case in?

divorce_case_number.label: Divorce case number (if known)
divorce_case_number.helpText: Optional but helpful for court coordination

pending_custody.label: Is there a pending custody case?
pending_custody.helpText: Check this only if there is currently a custody case pending

custody_parish.label: Which parish is the custody case in?

custody_case_number.label: Custody case number (if known)
custody_case_number.helpText: Optional but helpful for court coordination

legalStatus.coordination_notice: Note: If case numbers are filed in different parishes, the court can still coordinate your protection order with those proceedings.

abuse.not_alone_notice: You are not alone. Check all types of abuse you have experienced. This helps the court understand your situation fully.
abuse.abuse_types_legend: What types of abuse have you experienced? (Check all that apply)

physical.label: Physical abuse (hitting, pushing, slapping, restraining)
physical.helpText: Any unwanted physical contact or violence

threats.label: Threats of violence (threatened to hurt you or others)
threats.helpText: Including threats to hurt children, pets, or family

sexual.label: Sexual abuse or assault
sexual.helpText: Any unwanted sexual contact or coercion

abuse.validation_error: Please select at least one type of abuse
abuse.detailed_description_label: Describe the abuse in more detail (optional)
abuse.detailed_description_helpText: You can provide more information here, but you'll also describe specific incidents in the next section

firearms.safety_warning: ⚠️ Important Safety Information: Access to firearms significantly increases danger in domestic violence situations. This information helps protect you.

abuser_has_guns.label: Does the person you're afraid of have access to guns or other weapons?
abuser_has_guns.helpText: Check this if they have access to guns they own, have in their home, car, or can easily get

gun_threats.label: Have they ever threatened you with a weapon?
gun_threats.helpText: Any type of weapon, including guns, knives, or other objects

concealed_carry.label: Do you know if they have a concealed carry permit?

number_of_guns.label: Approximately how many firearms do they have?
number_of_guns.helpText: Enter a number if you know, or leave blank

gun_types.label: What types of weapons? (Check all that apply)

gun_location.label: Where do they keep the guns?
gun_location.helpText: E.g., in the home, in their car, at work

firearms.federal_law_notice: Federal Law: Under federal law, people subject to protection orders cannot possess firearms. The court can order them to surrender any weapons.

incident.safety_notice: Your Safety: If you are in immediate danger right now, please call 911 or go to a safe location. This form can wait.

recent_incident_date.label: When did the most recent incident happen?
recent_incident_date.helpText: This helps establish urgency for your protection

recent_incident_description.label: Please describe what happened in the most recent incident
recent_incident_description.placeholder: Be specific about what they did or said. Include threats, physical violence, property damage...
recent_incident_description.helpText: Minimum 50 characters. Be as detailed as possible.

incident.character_count_error: Please provide more detail ({{count}}/50 characters minimum)

past_incidents.label: Please describe any past incidents of abuse (optional)
past_incidents.placeholder: Include dates if you remember them. List the most serious incidents...
past_incidents.helpText: This helps show a pattern of behavior

incident.remember_notice: Remember: You don't need to prove everything right now. The court will hear your full story at the hearing. Focus on the most recent and serious incidents.

relief.what_to_order_notice: What do you want the court to order? Check all protections you need. These will be included in your protection order if granted.
relief.relief_legend: I am asking the court to order: (Check all that apply)

no_abuse.label: Stop abusing, harassing, stalking, or threatening me
no_abuse.helpText: Prohibit all forms of abuse and harassment

no_contact.label: Have no contact with me
no_contact.helpText: No in-person, phone, text, email, or social media contact

stay_away.label: Stay away from my home, work, and school
stay_away.helpText: Maintain a specified distance from these locations

stay_away_work.label: Stay away from my workplace
stay_away_work.helpText: Cannot come to where you work

stay_away_school.label: Stay away from my school
stay_away_school.helpText: Cannot come to your educational institution

stay_away_children.label: Stay away from my children's school/daycare
stay_away_children.helpText: Protect children at their care locations

move_out.label: Move out of our shared home
move_out.helpText: Order them to leave if you live together

surrender_firearms.label: Surrender all firearms and weapons
surrender_firearms.helpText: Order them to turn in all guns to law enforcement

relief.other_relief_placeholder: Describe any other protections you need that aren't listed above...
relief.other_relief_helpText: Be specific about what you need to be safe
relief.validation_message: * Please select at least one type of protection
relief.remember_notice: Remember: The judge will decide which protections to grant based on your situation. Don't hesitate to ask for everything you need to be safe.

surrender_weapons.label: Surrender all firearms and weapons
surrender_weapons.helpText: Required by federal law for domestic violence protective orders

temporary_custody.label: Grant me temporary custody of our children
temporary_custody.helpText: Until a full custody hearing can be held

no_child_contact.label: No contact with our children
no_child_contact.helpText: Completely restrict defendant's contact with children

supervised_visitation.label: Allow only supervised visitation with children
supervised_visitation.helpText: Visits must occur with a third party present

exclusive_use_home.label: Grant me exclusive use of our shared home

pet_protection.label: Protect my pets from harm
pet_protection.helpText: Include pets in the protection order

other_details.label: Describe any other protection you need
other_details.placeholder: Explain what other orders you're requesting...

relief.validation_error: Please select at least one form of relief

property.property_notice: Property Protection: The court can order exclusive use of your home and protect your personal property and pets.

shared_residence.label: Do you and the abuser share a residence?
shared_residence.helpText: Do you currently live together or jointly own/lease a home?

request_exclusive_use.label: Do you want exclusive use of the residence?
request_exclusive_use.helpText: This would require them to leave

home_ownership.label: Who owns or leases the residence?

request_property_return.label: Do you need the court to order return of your personal property?
request_property_return.helpText: Items that belong to you that they're keeping

property_description.label: Describe the property you want returned
property_description.placeholder: List important items: phone, keys, documents, clothing, etc.

have_pets.label: Do you have pets that need protection?
have_pets.helpText: Pets can be included in protection orders

property.pet_safety_notice: Pet Protection: Louisiana law allows courts to include pets in protection orders to prevent harm or intimidation.

custody.not_applicable_notice: This section only applies if you have children. You indicated earlier that you don't have children, so you can skip this section.
custody.temporary_custody_notice: Temporary Custody: The court can grant you temporary custody of your children until a full hearing. This is separate from permanent custody arrangements.

request_temporary_custody.label: Do you want temporary custody of your children?
request_temporary_custody.helpText: This would give you legal custody until the hearing

current_custody.label: Where do the children currently live?

custody_concerns.label: Do you have safety concerns about the children being with the other parent?
custody_concerns.helpText: Explain why temporary custody is needed

safety_explanation.label: Explain your safety concerns
safety_explanation.placeholder: Describe why you believe the children are not safe...

custody.hearing_notice: Note: Temporary custody is effective until a full hearing. The court will schedule a hearing to determine permanent custody arrangements.

witness.strengthen_case_notice: Witnesses Strengthen Your Case: People who saw or heard the abuse, or who you told about it afterwards, can testify at your hearing. You don't need witnesses to get a protection order, but they can help.

have_witnesses.label: Do you have witnesses who can testify about the abuse?
have_witnesses.helpText: People who saw, heard, or know about the incidents

witness.witness_instructions: Provide the name and contact information for each witness. Include how they know about the abuse (saw it, heard it, you told them afterwards, etc.).
witness.no_witnesses_notice: No Witnesses Listed: It's okay if you don't have witnesses. The court will consider your testimony and any other evidence you provide.

affirmation.legal_warning: ⚠️ Legal Warning: Making false statements on this form is perjury, a crime punishable by law. Only provide information you know to be true.

statement_true.label: I swear that everything in this petition is true to the best of my knowledge
statement_true.helpText: By checking this box, you are swearing under oath

understand_perjury.label: I understand that making false statements is perjury
understand_perjury.helpText: Perjury is a crime that can result in fines or imprisonment

affirmation.signature_notice: Electronic Signature: When you submit this form, your typed name will serve as your electronic signature, which has the same legal effect as a handwritten signature.
affirmation.ready_to_file: Once you complete all sections and check these boxes, you'll be ready to download your completed petition to file with the court.

form.title: Louisiana Uniform Abuse Prevention Order
form.subtitle: Order to Modify or Dissolve a Prior Louisiana Uniform Abuse Prevention Order

lporfForm.title: Confidential Address Form
lporfForm.subtitle: LPOR-F - To be used when petitioner does not want defendant to learn address

filingPurpose.title: Filing Purpose (Paragraph 1)
filingPurpose.subtitle: Petitioner files this petition on behalf of:

filingPurpose.description: Petitioner files this petition on behalf of:
filingPurpose.validationError: You must select at least one filing purpose option.

addresses.description: Please provide address information for all parties. Check the box below if all parties live at the same address.
addresses.differentAddressWarning: If children or incompetent persons have different addresses, a separate form must be completed for each address.

sameAddressForAll.label: All parties live at the same address

minorChildren.description: Add details for each minor child (Name, Date of Birth, Relationship to Petitioner):
minorChildren.listDescription: Add details for each minor child below:
minorChildren.maxEntriesMessage: Maximum 6 children per form. Please complete a separate form for additional children.
minorChildren.validationError: At least one minor child must be added when filing on behalf of minor children.

allegedIncompetent.description: Add details for each alleged incompetent person (Name, Date of Birth, Relationship to Petitioner):
allegedIncompetent.listDescription: Add details for each alleged incompetent person below:
allegedIncompetent.emptyStateText: No alleged incompetent persons added yet
allegedIncompetent.maxEntriesMessage: Maximum 2 incompetent persons per form. Please complete a separate form for additional persons.
allegedIncompetent.validationError: At least one alleged incompetent person must be added when filing on behalf of alleged incompetent persons.

fullName.label: Full Name
fullName.helpText: Enter the full legal name of the defendant

parentGuardianName.label: Parent/Guardian Name (if defendant is a minor)
parentGuardianName.helpText: Enter parent or guardian name if defendant is a minor

incidentLocation.label: Location of Incident
incidentLocation.placeholder: Enter the location where the violation occurred

violationType.label: Type of Violation (select all that apply)

violationDescription.label: Description of Violation
violationDescription.placeholder: Provide a detailed description of how the protection order was violated

policeNotified.label: Were the police notified of this violation?

isEmergency.label: Is this an emergency request requiring immediate attention?

emergencyReason.label: Reason for Emergency
emergencyReason.placeholder: Explain why this requires immediate attention

confirmation.label: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and complete
confirmation.helpText: Please review all information before submitting. This confirmation is required to proceed.

success.title: Form Submitted Successfully!
success.description: Your {{formType}} form has been generated and downloaded to your device.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps:
nextSteps.step1: Review the downloaded PDF for accuracy
nextSteps.step2: Print and sign the document where required
nextSteps.step3: File the form with the appropriate court
nextSteps.step4: Keep a copy for your records

success.importantNote: This form must be filed with the court to be legally effective. Consult with legal counsel if you have questions about the filing process.
